Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 103 Timetable Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI to Capital Park

September 15, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi Bus 103 provides a crucial transportation link across various neighborhoods and landmarks within the city. Operating throughout the day, it serves both residents and visitors, connecting them to key destinations across Abu Dhabi.

Bus Timings

The 103 bus at Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI, operates at regular intervals throughout the day. Services start as early as 12:00 PM and continue until late in the evening, providing commuters with flexible and convenient travel options.

From Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI From Capital Park
05:00 05:00
05:30 05:30
06:00 06:00
06:20 06:20
06:41 06:40
07:00 07:00

Download PDF Bus 103

Bus 103 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or simply follow this link to view the 103 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The 103 bus route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI

  2. Al ‘iffah Street

  3. Al Nasr Street

  4. Al Daye Street

  5. Al Anwar Street

  6. Al Rasi Street

  7. Emirates Heritage Club

  8. Naseem Al Barr Street

  9. Al Dolpheen Street

  10. Al Widad Street

  11. Mubarak Bin Sumaida Mosque

  12. LLH Medical Centre

  13. Al Ain University

  14. Burjeel Medical City

  15. Bohra Islamic Cultural Complex

  16. Mazyad Mall

  17. Mazyad Mall

  18. Capital Mall

  19. Abu Dhar Al-Afary Mosque

  1. Najm Suhayl Street

  2. Al Maqta Bus Interchange

  3. Al Noor Hospital

  4. Saif Ghobash Street

  5. Rabdan Street

  6. Mishrif Mall

  7. Immigration Department

  8. ITC Bus Depot

  9. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street

  10. Al Falah Street

  11. Etisalat

  12. Heritage Park

  13. Central Souq

  14. Capital Park

Also See: Dubai Bus F32: Route and Stops Explained

Bus Ticket Price

The exact fare for Abu Dhabi’s 103 bus is unknown, but standard routes in the city typically cost around AED 4. The fare may vary by distance. You can also ask the bus driver upon boarding.

Discover the essentials of traveling from Abu Dhabi to Salalah by road with our review of bus times and ticket fares.

Bus Booking

Online booking options may be available through official transportation portals or mobile applications, providing convenience for passengers to plan their journeys in advance.

Journey Experience

A trip on the 103 bus route from Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI to Capital Park offers a long but enriching journey through the vibrant landscapes of Abu Dhabi.

The route winds through the city, offering views of modern architecture and the lively streets of Abu Dhabi. As the bus approaches Capital Park, passengers are treated to a glimpse of one of the city’s green havens, perfect for relaxation amidst the urban setting. This route not only connects key locations but also provides a scenic tour of Abu Dhabi’s growing urban landscape and cultural sites.

Read More: Detailed Information on Dubai Bus X13: Route and Stops

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can conveniently reach Capital Park, the furthest destination on the 103 bus route originating from Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI. This service offers a price range between AED 89 to AED 107, providing flexibility and ease of travel across Abu Dhabi. Careem ensures reliable transportation with the convenience of mobile booking, making it a preferred choice for commuters seeking efficient journeys within the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 15, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
